free_text: High spin selectivity in alpha-particle induced
a thin surface-barrier silicon detector delta E of
70 mu-m thickness and a thick lithium-drifted silicon
Magnesium target was obtained by evaporation of the
separated 24Mg isotope. The thickness of the target was
determined to be 0.265 mg/cm2 with an accuracy +-1%, by
The energy error of the beam.
